actions.send_hint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline

ask.title: Ask anything across your corpus.
ask.subtitle: Hybrid retrieval over graph and vector, reranked by cross-encoder, with inline citations.
ask.emptyAnswerFallback: The model returned no answer text. Showing the {{count}} retrieved chunk(s) instead.
ask.heroSubtitle: Hybrid retrieval over graph and vector, reranked by cross-encoder, with inline citations back to the chunks the answer actually used.
ask.noAnswerNoSources: The model returned no answer and no sources matched.
ask.graphRetrieverHint: Neo4j 1-hop traversal joined into RRF fusion. Off when you only want dense + sparse.

summarizeRrf.title: Summarize the latest RRF fusion paper in the corpus.

mapEntities.title: Map the entities most cited across documents about hybrid retrieval.

compareChunking.title: Compare chunking strategies we evaluated for this corpus.

evalDelta.title: What changed in the eval p@5 after we switched to bge-reranker-v2-m3?

context.title: Context manager
context.openThreadFirst: Open a thread first; pins are scoped per conversation.
context.emptyHint: Pins live on the thread checkpoint. Open or start a thread to begin pinning chunks.
context.findChunkIdsHint: Find chunk ids in the citations list or the Library chunks tab — they're stable across runs.
context.pinnedSectionHint: Carried into every subsequent /ask turn on this thread.
context.excludedSectionHint: Skipped during reranking even when they score highly.
context.clearConfirm: Clear every pin and exclusion in this thread?

inspector.title: Turn inspector
inspector.question: Question
inspector.noCitations: No citations attached to this turn.

retrieve.label: Retrieve
retrieve.description: Milvus hybrid (dense + BM25) + Neo4j graph local search, fused via RRF.

rerank.label: Rerank
rerank.description: Cross-encoder reranks the candidate pool down to k_rerank.

generate.label: Generate
generate.description: LLM synthesises a cited answer from the reranked context.

library.title: Library
library.empty: No documents yet. Ingest a PDF or URL to get started.
library.heading: Library.
library.kindNote: Kind is derived from source_uri client-side. Status + indexed_at land when the backend grows those columns.
library.noMatch: No documents match the current filters.
library.reindexNothingDesc: Re-index only supports docs with an http(s) source_uri.
library.reindexQueuedDesc: Skipped docs were ingested from file or pasted text.
library.deleteDialogDesc_one: This wipes every chunk + entity belonging to the selected document from Milvus and Neo4j. The action is irreversible.
library.deleteDialogDesc_other: This wipes every chunk + entity belonging to the selected documents from Milvus and Neo4j. The action is irreversible.
library.confirmDeleteOne: Delete "{{title}}" and all {{formattedCount}} chunks? This cannot be undone.
library.noChunks: No chunks indexed for this document.
library.noEntities: No entities extracted for this document.

ingest.title: Ingest
ingest.empty: Drop a file, paste a URL, or run a web search.
ingest.subtitle: Bring a URL, a file, or web-search hits into the corpus. Indexing runs Milvus hybrid + Neo4j entity extraction on each document.
ingest.heading: Ingest.

url.label: URL to crawl
url.hint: Crawl4AI renders the page (JS-aware) and converts to markdown. Chunked + embedded into Milvus and the knowledge graph.

file.dropzone: Drop a PDF / DOCX or click to choose.

text.titlePlaceholder: Auto-derived from first line if empty

knobs.title: Indexing parameters
knobs.subtitle: Applied to every ingest. Change them in Settings.
knobs.pipelineNote: Live pipeline view (per-stage timing via SSE) is a follow-up — the current /api/ingest call is synchronous and reports the final <docref>doc_id + chunks</docref> on completion.

threads.title: Threads
threads.noModelData: No model data yet — runs are required.
threads.emptyDetail: Threads appear here after you ask a question from the Ask page.
threads.noMatchDetail_one: {{formattedCount}} thread indexed, but none contain that string.
threads.noMatchDetail_other: {{formattedCount}} threads indexed, but none contain that string.
threads.noMessages: No messages stored for this thread.

graph.title: Knowledge graph
graph.empty: The graph is empty. Index some documents to populate entities and relations.
graph.selectionHint: Click any node to inspect; click again to clear.
graph.pickSeed: Pick a seed entity on the left to start.
graph.loadNeighborhood: Load a neighborhood to inspect nodes.
graph.nodeNotInView: That node isn't in the current view.
graph.noIncidentEdges: No incident edges in this view.

evals.title: Evals
evals.empty: Retrieval quality dashboard will appear here once you've run an eval.
evals.perQuestionHint: Metrics computed against the gold-label qa_pairs.json fixture for each question.
evals.ragasHint: Answer-quality metrics from the RAGAS framework, computed once per eval run.

history.title: Run history
history.empty: Runs appear here after you ask a question from the Ask page.
history.subtitle: Every /ask writes one row. Errors are kept too — useful for tracking down model failures or retrieval misses.
history.heading: Run history.
history.emptyFilterBody_one: {{value}} run indexed, but none match the current filter.
history.emptyFilterBody_other: {{value}} runs indexed, but none match the current filter.

settings.title: Settings.
settings.subtitle: Live retrieval knobs. Changes apply immediately and persist across server restarts.

hybrid.title: Hybrid retrieval
hybrid.subtitle: Dense + sparse + graph candidates fused, reranked by a cross-encoder.

dense.label: Dense retriever
dense.description: Cosine ANN over Milvus dense vectors.

sparse.label: Sparse retriever (BM25)
sparse.description: Milvus native BM25 over the sparse text field.

graph.label: Graph retriever (Neo4j local-search)
graph.description: 1-hop traversal joined into the fusion step.

fusion.title: Fusion
fusion.subtitle: How dense + sparse + graph rankings are combined into one ordered list.

weighted.label: Weighted
weighted.hint: uses the graph / vector weights below

llm.title: LLM
llm.subtitle: Provider + model per tier. Changes take effect on the next graph run — the factory cache is busted automatically.

default.label: Default (answer LLM)
default.description: The chat model used to synthesise answers. The full-quality tier.

light.label: Light (structured output)
light.description: Cheaper / faster tier for JSON-shaped sub-tasks (rerank prompts, contextual retrieval).

nano.label: Nano (smallest)
nano.description: Smallest local-only tier used by fast classification + safety checks.

llm.reasoningWarning: Reasoning-class models (gpt-5*, o*) ignore the temperature slider — the API rejects any value other than the default.

model.reasoningNote: Reasoning model — temperature setting is ignored by the API.

embeddings.title: Embeddings
embeddings.subtitle: Embedding provider + model. Pinned to the schema baked into Milvus — change via .env, then reindex.

indexing.title: Indexing
indexing.subtitle: Knobs applied during ingest. Reindex to apply contextual changes to existing chunks.

contextual.label: Contextual retrieval
contextual.description: Prefix each chunk with an LLM-generated summary of the document context.

rerank.title: Reranker
rerank.subtitle: Cross-encoder applied after fusion. Score-floor drops weak chunks before they reach the LLM.

adaptive.label: Adaptive truncation
adaptive.description: Stop collecting once cumulative score-mass crosses 0.85 — keeps LLM context lean on easy queries.

crag.title: Corrective RAG
crag.subtitle: After reranking, the agent grades the local sources. Weak grades trigger a query rewrite and a web search you approve before anything is crawled.

enable.label: Enable Corrective RAG
enable.description: Grade local sources and self-correct when they are thin.

gradeBand.label: Grade band
gradeBand.description: Below the low handle answers are graded Incorrect; above the high handle, Correct; the middle lets the LLM decide.

maxCorrections.label: Max corrections per question
maxCorrections.description: How many times the agent may loop back to the web before answering anyway.

maxUrls.label: Web fallback · max URLs
maxUrls.description: Cap the candidate URLs shown for approval per correction.

crag.disabledNote: Corrective RAG is disabled. Enable it above to have the agent self-correct weak local retrievals via web fallback.

services.title: Service health
services.subtitle: Live per-service liveness + p50 latency. Re-probed every 30 seconds.

danger.title: Destructive operations
danger.subtitle: Everything in this tab is irreversible. The confirmation input must match the scope name exactly before the button enables.

corpus.title: Wipe corpus
corpus.summary: Drops the Milvus chunks collection and DETACH DELETE every node in Neo4j. Threads and pins survive.

threads.title: Wipe threads
threads.summary: TRUNCATEs every LangGraph checkpoint table + drops the on-disk pins file. Corpus is untouched.

all.title: Wipe everything
all.summary: Both of the above, in one call. Equivalent to a fresh install.
details: Corpus + threads in one transaction-like sequence
Use after major schema changes or when reproducing a clean baseline

approval.title: Need more sources?
approval.crawlingSubtitle: Indexing into the corpus, then re-retrieving and answering.
approval.partialFailTitle: {{failed}} of {{total}} URLs failed to crawl — answered from the rest.
approval.partialFailSubtitle: The corpus gained {{chunks}} chunks from the page that succeeded.

crag.declinedChip: Declined web search · answered from local corpus.
crag.composerLocked: Resume the pending approval to continue
